client_id.description: Genesys Cloud OAuth client credentials grant client id. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Genesys Cloud OAuth client credentials grant client secret. Never logged.

base_url.description: Genesys Cloud Platform API base URL, e.g. https://api.mypurecloud.com/api/v2. No derived default: legacy derives this from a region config value (https://api.<region>/api/v2, region defaulting to mypurecloud.com), but the engine's spec.json 'default' mechanism only materializes a fixed literal, not a value derived from another config key (conventions.md §3, auth0's identical audience narrowing) — set this explicitly instead of relying on region-based derivation.

token_url.description: Genesys Cloud OAuth token endpoint, e.g. https://login.mypurecloud.com/oauth/token. No derived default, for the same reason as base_url above: legacy derives this from region (https://login.<region>/oauth/token) but the engine cannot express a derived-from-another-config-key default.

scope.description: Optional OAuth scope requested on the client-credentials token exchange. Defaults to empty (no scope requested), matching legacy's own scope-only-if-set behavior (genesys.go:149-150).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-500), matching legacy's defaultPageSize/maxPageSize bounds.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
